## Research Direction

What direction, task, or hypothesis is being explored?

## Evidence Needed

- [ ] Demand sources
- [ ] Related papers
- [ ] Code or baselines
- [ ] Datasets
- [ ] Metrics

## Human Review Gate

What must be reviewed before moving to experiments?

## Expected Artifact

Report, matrix, experiment plan, code result, paper section, or slide package.

## Trust Risks

Possible weak sources, poisoned content, unverifiable claims, or data risks.
